exploration_notes:
The CSS Container Queries implementation in Servo spans two repositories: the external Stylo style engine (github.com/servo/stylo at rev 3b46f3ef) and the Servo browser itself.

**Stylo (external dependency):** The container query parsing and evaluation logic already exists in `style/stylesheets/container_rule.rs`. This includes `ContainerRule`, `ContainerCondition` (with `parse()`, `find_container()`, and `matches()` methods), `ContainerSizeQuery` (lazy-evaluated size lookup), and six evaluator
